page_content: STAT440 Sampling Theory (3 Credits) Simple random sampling. Sampling for proportions. Estimation of sample size. Sampling with varying probabilities. Sampling: stratiﬁed, systematic, cluster, double, sequential, incomplete. Prerequisite: 1 course with a minimum grade of C- from (STAT401, STAT420). Credit Only Granted for: STAT440 or SURV440.
